info.title: Hindclaw API
info.description: Access control API for Hindsight memory server

get.description: List API keys for a user. Keys are masked after creation.
Resolve and return effective access policy + bank policy for a context.

List installed templates filtered by access.

When scope is None, returns all server templates plus the caller's
personal templates. When scope is specified, returns only that scope.

Args:
    scope: Optional scope filter ('server' or 'personal').
    principal: Authenticated principal from IAM.

Returns:
    List of template summaries.

post.description:
Create a custom template (no marketplace source).

Args:
    request: Template creation payload.
    principal: Authenticated principal from IAM.

Returns:
    The created template.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 409 if template already exists.

get.description:
Get a custom template by scope and name.

Args:
    scope: Template scope ('server' or 'personal').
    name: Template name.
    principal: Authenticated principal from IAM.

Returns:
    Full template details.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if template not found.

put.description:
Update a custom template.

Performs cross-field validation when extraction mode or custom
instructions are part of the update by merging with the existing
record before applying.

Args:
    scope: Template scope ('server' or 'personal').
    name: Template name.
    request: Partial update payload.
    principal: Authenticated principal from IAM.

Returns:
    The updated template.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if template not found, 422 if cross-field
        validation fails.

delete.description:
Delete a custom template.

Args:
    scope: Template scope ('server' or 'personal').
    name: Template name.
    principal: Authenticated principal from IAM.

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if template not found.

EntityLabel.title: EntityLabel
EntityLabel.description:
An entity label definition for structured classification.

Hindsight supports three label types:
- "value": single enum value from the values list
- "multi-values": multiple enum values from the values list
- "text": free-form text (no values list needed)

The ``tag`` field controls whether facts with this label also get tagged
(enabling tag-based filtering in recall/reflect).

EntityLabelValue.title: EntityLabelValue
EntityLabelValue.description: A valid value for a value or multi-values entity label.

UpdateTemplateRequest.title: UpdateTemplateRequest
UpdateTemplateRequest.description:
Request to update an existing template. All fields optional.

Note: cross-field validation (e.g. custom mode requires custom instructions)
cannot be fully checked here because this is a partial update. The endpoint
must merge with the existing record and validate the final state.
